zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Collett Ayres於1432年出生在英國英格蘭肯特可雷福德時，她的父親Robert Henry Collett22歲，母親Christiana Knyvett16歲。她和John Harmon至少有3個兒子。她去世於1455年在她的家鄉享年23歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦可雷福德聖 包林努也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Ayres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ayers
meanings: English: derivative of Ayer , with excrescent -s. The -s may represent a trace of the Latin nominative singular in heres ‘heir’, but it may also signify the son or servant of someone known as ‘the heir’, i.e. someone who was heir to some great estate.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Collett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Collett Ayres was born in 1432, in Crayford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Henry Collett, was 22 and her mother, Christiana Knyvett, was 16. She had at least 3 sons with John Harmon. She died in 1455, in her hometown, at the age of 23, and was buried in St Paulinus' Church, Crayford, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Collett Ayres est née en 1432, à Crayford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Henry Collett, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Christiana Knyvett, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec John Harmon. Elle est décédée en 1455, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterrée à St Paulinus' Church, Crayford, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hatte mit John Harmon mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1455 im Alter von 23 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in St Paulinus' Church, Crayford, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con John Harmon. Morì nel 1455, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolta a St Paulinus' Church, Crayford, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Collett Ayresが1432年にイギリスイギリスケントクレイフォードで生まれた時，父Robert Henry Collettは22歳，母Christiana Knyvettは16歳であった。彼女はJohn Harmonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1455年に故郷で23歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンクレイフォードスト プアウリヌス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Paulinus Church, Crayford, London: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크라이퍼드 스트 폴이누스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Collett Ayres(이)가 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크라이퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Henry Collett(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christiana Knyvett(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 John Harmon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1455년 그녀의 고향에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크라이퍼드 스트 폴이누스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от John Harmon. Она умерла в 1455 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 23 лет и была похоронена в местности ст поулинус' чурч, креифорд, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
